column1: NEW | As expected, a Tornado Watch is now in effect until 8 pm. We've already had several tornado warnings inland. This will continue as conditions are favorable for more to develop in the outer bands of Debby.
🤦🏼‍♀️ I thought I was done with 🌪️🌪️🌪️🌪️ when I moved here from Tornado Alley, Tennessee
me, too, when I moved here from Texas. And there are no warning sirens here! 😩
We have had a lot up in IL, and we are moving down in a few weeks. At least we aren't afraid of them!
Right ? Forty Eight years of dealing with them and personally in numerous . Call us experienced 😂
thankfully tornadoes associated with tropical storms and hurricanes are pretty short lived. I moved here from TN 7 years ago 3 weeks before Irma hit
100% correct. Usually they are weak too. Nothing like the monsters you experienced in Tennessee.
That’s wonderful news! I lived in Murfreesboro, smack in the middle of the alley. Seems no matter where they originated, they always hit us
I lived in McMinnville and saw how often Murfreesboro got hit, as well as Crossville where I have friends

oh girl, you got hit enough in McMinnville. My ex daughter-in-law is from McMinnville. Heck, half the town is her family. Her uncle has a nursery, her mom was a teacher there, and her dad was the head of Parks & Recreation. You might even know them
as small as McMinnville was it's possible that I knew them
I do know them but not well
I wouldn’t call them fools. Maybe compared to what they’ve experienced before it is rare or infrequent
Tornado watch in Marion County as well
That's one thing I don't like about hurricanes are the tornado threat. 🙏
Currently raining and calm in Palm Harbor. We had a thunder storm worse than what we have now, last week.
Crap!!!!! I wondered if we were going to definitely be included. Thank you so much for constantly keeping us updated and informed. Take a good long break once this is over. You deserve it.

me too!! I had to turn it to fox 13
all the others are horrible lol .... They tone of voice just gives me anxiety lol
agree 100%

My weather radio has gone off more times today than I'd like it to. 📻...and, we are just getting started here in NPR.
When will it be at its worse here in our area in Tampa?? I'm in Cortez

I live in a mobile home. For a tornado warning, I take my dog, phone, pillows, a blanket, snack and water and sit in the bathtub until the warning is over. Am I supposed to stay in the bathtub until 8pm? Asking for a friend 😜
Can't we just have a stormy day without the tornado threat for a change 😩😩😩
Nothing going on in San Antonio fl
But 2 very very important questions for Denis Phillips is it raining in Disney and is my flight from Tampa cancelled 😂🤣😅

is joking as it's always asked. 😀 stay dry everyone
